meta.title: Merch – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: Please allow up to 3 days to process order. Local Pick Up at the brewery is available. Change the Ship To section in your cart to see this option.

meta.title: About Us – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: Opened in October of 2013, Hamburg Brewing Company is a production brewing facility complete with an alluring taproom and patio. We invite you to check out our place - just 20 minutes outside of Buffalo, NY - in Hamburg, NY where you can relax, listen to some live local music, and of course, enjoy the great beers we ha

meta.title: Contact Us – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: Have a question? We're here to help! Before you reach out, you may find the answer to your question below, or on the FAQ page here. Hours: Current taproom hours listed at the bottom of this page.  Reservations: We do not take reservations, all seating first come first served. We are open for both indoor dining and out

meta.title: Join Our Team – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: Current Openings: FOH ASSISTANT MANAGER LINE COOK PROMOTIONS/BRAND AMBASSADOR BARTENDER BUSSER/FOOD RUNNER DISHWASHER/DISH MACHINE OPERATOR

meta.title: Donations – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: DONATION REQUEST Please note the following before requesting donations Mandatory Criteria Requests must be submitted 30 days prior to requested receipt. Must be described as one of the following: An organization holding a current tax-exempt status under Section 501(c)(3), (4), (6) or (19) of the Internal Revenue Code.

meta.title: Bus and Limo Policy – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: We appreciate your interest in visiting Hamburg Brewing Company in a responsible manner. We are committed to ensuring all of our guests have a memorable and safe experience during their visit to the Tap Room. meta.title: New Account Inquiry – Hamburg Brewing Company
meta.description: Are you interested in serving or selling Hamburg Brewing beer at your bar, restaurant or store?  We would love to talk to you about working together. Please fill out the form below and we'll contact you as soon as possible.
